findings.description: ADR-002 Section 2 requires all justfiles to use safe shell settings: set shell := ["bash", "-euo", "pipefail", "-c"]
findings.current_state: scripts/justfile has no shell settings; inherits from lib.just which uses zsh

findings.description: ADR-002 Section 5 defines standard recipes. scripts/justfile has NO recipes at all.
findings.expected_state: Should implement null recipes for: install, clean, mktree, health, ls, ls-net, completions, build, template, test

findings.description: ADR-002 Section 7 requires recipes to be organized into standardized groups (lifecycle, info, build, service)
ADR-003 Section 3 states .meta.json pattern is DEPRECATED for new modules. Section 4.2 explicitly lists it as anti-pattern.
findings.current_state: Found .meta.json files at: /private/etc/dotfiles/adam/scripts/.meta.json and in subdirectories
findings.expected_state: Remove .meta.json files; rely on justfile and README.md for module definition

findings.description: ADR-003 Section 4 lists README.md as 'Recommended' module documentation
findings.current_state: No README.md found in scripts/ or subdirectories
findings.expected_state: Create README.md documenting module purpose and usage

findings.description: ADR-003 Section 5 provides identification criteria. scripts/ appears to be a collection container, not a module.
findings.current_state: Has subdirectories (active/, archive/, examples/) suggesting proxy/orchestration role
findings.expected_state: Clarify if this is a proxy justfile or a true module; if proxy, only orchestrate children

findings.note: No configuration files detected in scripts module
findings.description: ADR-004 applies to modules that generate configuration via templating
findings.current_state: scripts/ contains shell scripts and utilities, not configuration
findings.expected_state: If module generates configs, ensure config.toml, data.yml exist and follow pipeline

findings.description: ADR-005 applies to modules with data.yml configuration files
findings.expected_state: If module has dependencies, ports, services: create data.yml following schema

findings.violation: Shell scripts lack secret injection patterns
findings.description: ADR-006 defines secret management via 1Password injection. Scripts in active/nix-darwin/ may need secrets.
findings.current_state: Shell scripts (backup-configs.sh, initial-setup.sh) have no 1Password reference patterns
findings.expected_state: If scripts require secrets, use op inject pattern and document in README

findings.note: scripts module does not manage background services
findings.description: ADR-007 applies to modules that manage daemons/long-running processes
findings.current_state: scripts/ contains utility scripts and issue creation tools, no service management
findings.expected_state: Not applicable unless module is modified to manage services

critical_findings: No standard recipes implemented (install, clean, health, etc.)
Missing required shell settings (bash, safe flags)

recommended_actions.details: Add null implementations for all 10 standard recipes with proper [group()] attributes
Delete all .meta.json files from scripts/ and subdirectories
Document module purpose, structure, and contained scripts
Determine if scripts/ is a proxy/orchestration module or needs restructuring

recommended_actions.action: Document secret handling in active scripts
recommended_actions.details: If nix-darwin scripts need secrets, add 1Password injection documentation
